mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id, c.course_nm, c.course_desc, c.instructor_id, u.user_nm as instructor_nm, c.start_dt, c.end_dt, c.max_students, c.status, c.use_yn, c.reg_dt, c.upd_dt FROM tb_course c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.instructor_id = u.user_id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_course (course_id, course_nm, course_desc, instructor_id, start_dt, end_dt, max_students, status, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{courseNm}, #{courseDesc}, #{instructorId}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{maxStudents}, 'DRAFT', 'Y', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_course SET course_nm = #{courseNm}, course_desc = #{courseDesc}, start_dt = #{startDt}, end_dt = #{endDt}, max_students = #{maxStudents}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.select: SELECT course_id, course_nm, course_desc, instructor_id, start_dt, end_dt, max_students, status, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_course WHERE instructor_id = #{instructorId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
